zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald de Halle於1205年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特桑多時，他的父親Thomas de Halle38歲，母親Agnes Brentworth28歲。他於1240年之前與Agnes在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1252年在英國維爾爾布拉德福--阿文享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald de Halle于1205年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特桑多时，他的父亲Thomas de Halle38岁，母亲Agnes Brentworth28岁。他于1240年之前与Agnes在英国維爾爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1252年在英国維爾爾布拉德福--阿文享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Halle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Rejean, Marcel, Andre, Arianne, Armand, Camille, Fernand, Gaspard, Laurent.
German and English: variant of   Hall  .
French (also Hallé): topographic name from Old French halle ‘covered market’, from halla ‘covered room’.

variants.name: Hall
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, German, Norwegian, and Danish: from Middle English hall (Old English heall), Middle High German halle, Old Norse hǫll all meaning ‘hall’ (a spacious residence), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in or near a hall or an occupational name for a servant employed at a hall. In some cases it may be a habitational name from any of the places called with this word, which in some parts of Germany and Austria in the Middle Ages also denoted a salt mine. Hall is one of the commonest and most widely distributed of English surnames, bearing witness to the importance of the hall as a feature of the medieval village. The English surname has been established in Ireland since the 14th century, and, according to MacLysaght, has become numerous in Ulster since the 17th century.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from hall ‘hall’ (a spacious residence), or a habitational name from a placename containing the element hall ‘rock’ (from Old Norse hallr).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 何 and 賀, see   He   1 and 2.

variants.name: Hallee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Armand, Fernand, Henri, Napoleon, Renald, Urbain.

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald de Halle was born in 1205, in Sandown, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Halle, was 38 and his mother, Agnes Brentworth, was 28. He married Agnes before 1240, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1252, in Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 47.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald de Halleが1205年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアイスル オフ ウィトサンダウンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Halleは38歳，母Agnes Brentworthは28歳であった。1240年以前にイギリスウィルトシュアイアでAgnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1252年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアブラドフォード-オン-アボンで47歳で死去した。

ko.Tothill Manor, Sandown, Isle of Wight, E: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 샌다운
ko.Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트
ko.lifeSummary: Reginald de Halle(이)가 1205년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 샌다운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Halle(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Brentworth(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1240년 이전 영국 윌츠히르에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1252년 영국 윌츠히르 브래드퍼드--아폰에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald de Halle родился в 1205 г. в местности сэндоун, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Halle было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Brentworth, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes перед 1240 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1252 г. в местности брадфорд-он-авон, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.
